heading: Penalties
label: 1196 Penalties
notes: Amendments2008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Any person who willfully violates section 1192 or 1197(b) of this title, or who fails to comply with , shall be guilty of a misdemeanor, and upon conviction thereof shall be fined not more than $5,000 or be imprisoned not more than one year or both in the discretion of the court: , That nothing herein shall limit other provisions of this chapter.”Pub. L. 110–314section 1202(c) of this titleProvided1978— authorized penalties for noncompliance with .Pub. L. 95–631section 1202(c) of this title
